给你一个长度为 `n` 的整数数组 `nums`。

- **移动到相邻格子**：跳到下标 `i + 1` 或 `i - 1`，如果该下标在边界内。
- **质数传送**：如果 `nums[i]` 是一个**质数** `p`，你可以立即跳到任何满足 `nums[j] % p == 0` 的下标 `j` 处，且下标 `j != i` 。

返回到达下标 `n - 1` 所需的 **最少** 跳跃次数。

**质数** 是一个大于 1 的自然数，只有两个因子，1 和它本身。

 

**示例 1:**

**输入:** nums = [1,2,4,6]

**输出:** 2

**解释:**

一个最优的跳跃序列是：

- 从下标 `i = 0` 开始。向相邻下标 1 跳一步。
- 在下标 `i = 1`，`nums[1] = 2` 是一个质数。因此，我们传送到索引 `i = 3`，因为 `nums[3] = 6` 可以被 2 整除。

**输出:** 2

**输出:** 3

**解释:**

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  max_num = 1_000_000
  sieve = Array.new(max_num + 1, true)
  sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(max_num)).each do |i|
    if sieve[i]
      (i*i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
        sieve[j] = false
      end
    end
  end

  spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
  (2..max_num).each do |i|
    if spf[i] == 0
      spf[i] = i
      (i*2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
        if spf[j] == 0
          spf[j] = i
        end
      end
    end
  end

  prime_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
  nums.each_with_index do |num, idx|
    if num == 1
      next
    end
    factors = Set.new
    x = num
    while x > 1
      p = spf[x]
      factors << p
      while x % p == 0
        x /= p
      end
    end
    factors.each do |p|
      prime_indices[p] << idx
    end
  end

  visited = Array.new(n, false)
  queue = [[0, 0]]
  visited[0] = true

  while queue.any?
    idx, steps = queue.shift
    if idx == n - 1
      return steps
    end

    [idx-1, idx+1].each do |next_idx|
      if next_idx >= 0 && next_idx < n && !visited[next_idx]
        visited[next_idx] = true
        queue << [next_idx, steps + 1]
      end
    end

    num = nums[idx]
    if sieve[num]
      prime_list = prime_indices[num]
      prime_list.each do |j|
        if j != idx && !visited[j]
          visited[j] = true
          queue << [j, steps + 1]
        end
      end
    end
  end

  -1
end

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  max_num = 1_000_000
  sieve = Array.new(max_num + 1, true)
  sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(max_num)).each do |i|
    if sieve[i]
      (i*i..max_num).step(i) do |j|
        sieve[j] = false
      end
    end
  end

  spf = Array.new(max_num + 1, 0)
  (2..max_num).each do |i|
    if spf[i] == 0
      spf[i] = i
      (i*2..max_num).step(i) do |j|
        if spf[j] == 0
          spf[j] = i
        end
      end
    end
  end

  prime_indices = Hash.new { |h, k| h[k] = [] }
  nums.each_with_index do |num, idx|
    if num == 1
      next
    end
    factors = Set.new
    x = num
    while x > 1
      p = spf[x]
      factors << p
      while x % p == 0
        x /= p
      end
    end
    factors.each do |p|
      prime_indices[p] << idx
    end
  end

  visited = Array.new(n, false)
  queue = [[0, 0]]
  visited[0] = true

  while queue.any?
    idx, steps = queue.shift
    if idx == n - 1
      return steps
    end

    [idx-1, idx+1].each do |next_idx|
      if next_idx >= 0 && next_idx < n && !visited[next_idx]
        visited[next_idx] = true
        queue << [next_idx, steps + 1]
      end
    end

    num = nums[idx]
    if sieve[num]
      prime_list = prime_indices[num]
      prime_list.each do |j|
        if j != idx && !visited[j]
          visited[j] = true
          queue << [j, steps + 1]
        end
      end
    end
  end

  -1
end
